_meta.maps_to: M-26-14 Appendix C Data Retention Level 3 (Advanced): searchable >= 90 days, retrievable >= 365 days
_meta.notes: Indices remain on hot/warm nodes (searchable) for 90d after rollover (~90-120d total searchable), then move to frozen until deletion at 365d post-rollover. For Level 4 Optimal (>=180d searchable), raise the frozen phase min_age to 180d; no separate L4 policy file ships, by design. snapshot_repository default 'found-snapshots' is Cloud Hosted's built-in repo; change on ECE/self-managed. See docs/COMPAT.md.
